body.notes: | BLOCKED: Encode yield_to = attention shift semantic in primitives catalog first. Basket handoff contract needs to be defined before implementation.
body.title: Yield primitive: yield_to(habit_id) — pass control to another habit with shared basket
body.result: Won't implement. Call stack semantics are non-biological — no saved namespace, no return address in biology. Superseded by T-habit-templates: templates expand into reactive habit chains at design time. At runtime there's only habits.
body.description: prim_yield_to(habit_id_key) -> suspend current habit, launch target habit with current basket as its starting basket, resume when target sets basket[__status__]=done. Enables coroutine-style composition: habit A does setup, yields to habit B for the heavy work, resumes for cleanup. In v1: synchronous (A waits). Async version deferred. Requires T-basket-schema (done) and T-condition-evaluator.
